product: Project-scale reclaimed wood sourcing (beams, siding & paneling, barn board, corral fencing) for builders, architects, and designers

claims.source_url: https://www.woodcraftingllc.com/ (company positioning: '100% reclaimed', 'every characteristic of hundreds of years of use')
